positive: A stylized, symmetrical minimalist illustration of a majestic mountain range at sunrise. The composition is centered, featuring bold, clean silhouettes of layered peaks and foothills. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo blues, burnt orange, and muted cream, creating a high-contrast, graphic look. The style should be modern, vector-graphic inspired, suitable for screen printing on apparel. Include stylized stylized clouds and a subtle celestial body (like a stylized crescent moon or sun disk) to enhance the silhouette effect. Flat graphic design, strong lines, negative space focus, high contrast.
negative: blur, low quality, noise, watermark, logo, text, messy, ugly, realistic photo, artifacts, bad anatomy, extra limbs
